threshold_count: Recurrent urination into clothing or bedding (voluntary or involuntary)
duration_rule: 2+ times/week for 3+ months; patient is at least 5 years old

symptoms.description: The patient repeatedly voids urine into bedding or clothing, whether involuntarily or intentionally.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

threshold_count: Recurrent defecation in improper locations (voluntary or accidental)
duration_rule: 1+ times/month for 3+ months; patient is at least 4 years old

symptoms.description: The patient repeatedly passes feces into inappropriate places, such as clothing or the floor, whether voluntarily or accidentally.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

threshold_count: Symptoms of encopresis or enuresis that cause distress but do not meet full criteria

symptoms.description: The patient exhibits symptoms of encopresis or enuresis that fall below the diagnostic threshold.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

threshold_count: Elimination symptoms present but insufficient information for specific diagnosis

symptoms.description: The patient exhibits symptoms of an elimination disorder, but there is insufficient information to make a specific diagnosis.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.
